title: 2026: SEC to Prioritise Mobilisation of Long Term Funds, Others -DG - FinancialEDGE
description: The Securities and Exchange Commission has said that it is prioritizing the mobilization of long-term capital to bridge Nigeria’s infrastructure and sectoral gaps while also streamlining regulatory frameworks and aggressively facilitating the issuance of innovative financial instruments that channel disciplined capital into productive sectors. This was disclosed in a New Year Mesage by Director General
html: The Securities and Exchange Commission has said that it is prioritizing the mobilization of long-term capital to bridge Nigeria’s infrastructure and sectoral gaps while also streamlining regulatory frameworks and aggressively facilitating the issuance of innovative financial instruments that channel disciplined capital into productive sectors.
